ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the income groups table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_nominal" TEXT /* Nominal GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_ppp" TEXT /* GDP (PPP) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso3"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_group_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_deciles" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for income record */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code referring to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the income data is recorded */,
  "decile_1" INTEGER /* Population count in the first income decile (<10%) */,
  "decile_2" INTEGER /* Population count in the second income decile (10-20%) */,
  "decile_3" INTEGER /* Population count in the third income decile (20-30%) */,
  "decile_4" INTEGER /* Population count in the fourth income decile (30-40%) */,
  "decile_5" INTEGER /* Population count in the fifth income decile (40-50%) */,
  "decile_6" INTEGER /* Population count in the sixth income decile (50-60%) */,
  "decile_7" INTEGER /* Population count in the seventh income decile (60-70%) */,
  "decile_8" INTEGER /* Population count in the eighth income decile (70-80%) */,
  "decile_9" INTEGER /* Population count in the ninth income decile (80-90%) */,
  "decile_10" INTEGER /* Population count in the top income decile (>90%) */,
  "gini_coefficient" TEXT /* Gini coefficient measuring income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_deciles_iso3 FOREIGN KEY ("iso3") REFERENCES countries ("iso3")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's characteristics */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Name of the income group (e.g., Low Income, Emerging Market) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic status of the group */,
  "lower_bound" TEXT /* Lower bound of the income range for the group */,
  "upper_bound" TEXT /* Upper bound of the income range for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_deciles ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income record associated with this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User that made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_deciles ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user that created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the income_deciles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "income_id")
)
